title: U.S. job creation cools in June with payrolls growth of just 57,000; unemployment rate at 4.2%
summary_full: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to rise by 115,000 in June and the unemployment rate to hold steady at 4.3%.
summary_public: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to rise by 115,000 in June and the unemployment rate to hold steady at 4.3%.
